page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8y.small is an entry-level virtual server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features a single dedicated physical core and vCPU utilizing the 64-bit ARM architecture, specifically the Alibaba Yitian 710 processor running at a clock speed of 2.75 GHz. The processor configuration includes 64 KB of L1d cache, 1.0 MB of L2 cache, and 64 MB of L3 cache, with hardware support for AES cryptography.

The instance is configured with 2.0 GB of system memory, yielding a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying entirely on external network storage options. Network connectivity is provisioned with a baseline bandwidth of 1 Gbps, and the instance does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Performance benchmarks indicate average single-core capabilities, with stress-ng single-core CPU performance scoring 1773.69 and single-threaded gzip compression reaching 27.84 GB/sec. However, due to its single-core limitation, multi-core and memory bandwidth metrics fall into the lower percentiles, such as a passmark CPU score of 836.56 and uncached memory write speeds of 7.51 GB/sec. This hardware profile represents a highly cost-efficient option for lightweight, single-threaded workloads, basic web serving, and small-scale testing environments that do not require high memory density or parallel processing.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8y.small is an entry-level virtual server powered by the ARM-based Alibaba Yitian 710 processor. Operating at 2.75 GHz, this KVM-based instance features a single dedicated physical core and vCPU, paired with 2.0 GB of system memory. It lacks local storage and GPU acceleration, relying on a 1 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Benchmarks show average single-core performance, with a stress-ng single-core score of 1773.69 and single-threaded gzip compression of 27.84 GB/sec, though multi-core and memory bandwidth metrics are expectedly low due to the single-vCPU constraint. The instance provides a highly cost-efficient profile for lightweight, single-threaded applications, basic web serving, and development testing.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8y.small is a single-vCPU ARM-based instance featuring a 2.75 GHz Yitian 710 processor, 2.0 GB of RAM, and 1 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for lightweight workloads.

tagline: An entry-level ARM-based virtual server featuring a dedicated single-core processor and balanced resources for lightweight single-threaded workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by a single-core Alibaba Yitian 710 ARM processor at 2.75 GHz
Equipped with 2.0 GB of system memory and 1 Gbps baseline network bandwidth
Dedicated CPU allocation with KVM hypervisor virtualization
Best suited for lightweight single-threaded applications and basic web serving
